title: No Moon
body:
#
### IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE PLAYING

WARNING: If you don't want the game to crash then go to the config and turn game crashes off. This mod will destroy your world and destroy your builds. Most bad things can be toggled off in the config.

WARNING: Flashing lights & Loud noises.

This Mod should work in Multiplayer mode as stated by the Mod Creator

If you are sensitive to flashing lights then go to the config. If you don't know how to get to the config then type in the command /help_config

This mod works with [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) installed, so go ahead and do that if youd like, Just make sure to turn on tbsmode so it won't be unfair

#
### A Video Made by a Friend:
